description: Simple bug fix - should trigger plan mode and verification
prompt: There's a bug in my app: users can't log in after password reset. Fix it.
expectations: Writes a plan to tasks/todo.md before implementing
Identifies root cause rather than applying a patch
Verifies the fix works before declaring done
Does not ask unnecessary clarifying questions

description: Complex feature - should use full workflow
prompt: Build a CSV export feature for the user dashboard. It should support date ranges and column selection.
expectations: Enters plan mode and writes detailed spec upfront
Breaks down into checkable steps in tasks/todo.md
Verifies implementation matches spec before done

prompt: Rename the function `get_usr` to `get_user` in auth.py.
expectations: Does NOT enter plan mode (simple task)
Makes the change directly and efficiently
Checks for references to the old name
Confirms done quickly without unnecessary overhead

description: Mid-task correction - should trigger lessons capture
prompt: You've been implementing a search feature. The user says: 'You forgot to handle the empty query case, and this is the second time you've made this mistake.'
expectations: Acknowledges the mistake without excessive apology
Writes a specific rule to prevent the same mistake
